author: AP
description: Weighted compliance scoring model for EU AI Act Articles 9-15

rationale.RC-05: Human oversight weighted highest — Article 14 is the most operationally critical control for deployed AI systems
rationale.RC-01: Risk management second — absence of a lifecycle process undermines all other controls
rationale.RC-03: Technical documentation third — regulators cannot assess what is not documented
rationale.RC-02: Data governance fourth — foundational but often partially addressed in public cards
rationale.RC-06: Accuracy and robustness fifth — often present in benchmark form even if incomplete
rationale.RC-04: Transparency lowest weight — most providers address this at surface level
